cph.runTestCases.title: Run Testcases
cph.submitToCodeForces.title: Submit to CodeForces
cph.judgeView.name: Results
cph.judgeViewContainer.title: CPH Judge
cph.configuration.title: Competitive Programming Helper
cph.general.saveLocation.description: Location where generated .tcs and .bin files will be saved. Leave empty to save the file in the source file directory. Use this to clean up your folders.
cph.general.timeOut.description: The time in ms for which a testcase is run before it is killed ( timed-out ).
cph.general.hideStderrorWhenCompiledOK.d: Ignore and don't show stderror when compilation exit code is zero.
cph.general.ignoreSTDERROR.description: If enabled, non-empty standard error will not result in testcase failing.
cph.language.c.Args.title: Compilation flags for .c files
cph.language.c.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to gcc ( for C ) while compiling your file. Example '-O2 -Wall'
cph.language.c.SubmissionCompiler.descri: The compiler chosen in the drop down during Codeforces submission for c
cph.language.c.Command.description: Command used to compile .c files. Example 'gcc', 'gcc-10', 'clang', 'msvc', etc.
cph.language.c.OutputArg.description: C compiler's argument that specifies the output files.
cph.language.cpp.Args.title: Compilation flags for .cpp files
cph.language.cpp.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to g++ ( for C++ ) while compiling your file. Example '-Wmaybe-uninitialized -std=c++14'
cph.language.cpp.SubmissionCompiler.desc: The compiler chosen in the drop down during Codeforces submission for cpp
cph.language.cpp.Command.description: Command used to compile .cpp files. Example 'g++', 'g++-10', 'clang++', etc.
cph.language.cpp.OutputArg.description: C++ compiler's argument that specifies the output files.
cph.language.csharp.Args.title: Compilation flags for .cs files
cph.language.csharp.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to dotnet while compiling your file.
cph.language.csharp.SubmissionCompiler.d: The compiler chosen in the drop down during Codeforces submission for C#
cph.language.csharp.Command.description: Command used to compile .cs files. 'dotnet' for C# .NET, 'mcs' for C# Mono
cph.language.python.Args.title: Compilation flags for Python
cph.language.python.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to python while compiling your file. Example '-Wignore -u'
cph.language.python.SubmissionCompiler.d: The compiler chosen in the drop down during Codeforces submission for python
cph.language.python.Command.description: Command used to run python files. Example 'py', 'python3', 'pypy3', etc.
cph.language.ruby.Args.title: Compilation flags for ruby
cph.language.ruby.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to ruby while compiling your file.
cph.language.ruby.SubmissionCompiler.des: The compiler chosen in the drop down during Codeforces submission for python
cph.language.ruby.Command.description: Command used to run ruby files.
cph.language.rust.Args.title: Compilation flags for Rust
cph.language.rust.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to rustc while compiling your file. Example '-O2 --verbose'
cph.language.rust.SubmissionCompiler.des: The compiler chosen in the drop down during Codeforces submission for rust
cph.language.rust.Command.description: Command used to compile rust files.
cph.language.go.Args.title: Compilation flags for .go files
cph.language.go.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to go while compiling your file. Example '-gcflags=-S'
cph.language.go.SubmissionCompiler.descr: The compiler chosen in the drop down during Codeforces submission for go
cph.language.haskell.Args.title: Compilation flags for .hs files
cph.language.haskell.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to go while compiling your file.
The compiler chosen in the drop down during Codeforces submission for haskell
cph.language.java.Args.title: Compilation flags for Java
cph.language.java.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to javac while compiling your file. Example '-verbose'
cph.language.java.SubmissionCompiler.des: The compiler chosen in the drop down during Codeforces submission for java
cph.language.java.Command.description: Command used to compile java files.
cph.language.js.Args.title: Compilation flags for JavaScript
cph.language.js.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to node (for JavaScript) while compiling your file. Example '--abort-on-uncaught-exception'
cph.language.js.SubmissionCompiler.descr: The compiler chosen in the drop down during Codeforces submission for js
cph.language.cangjie.Args.title: Compilation flags for Cangjie
cph.language.cangjie.Args.description: Space seperated additional flags passed to cangjie-compiler while compiling your file.
cph.general.firstTime.title: Show welcome message
cph.general.firstTime.description: A welcome message is shown when you run a testcase for the first time. This setting is updated automatically after the first message is shown.
cph.general.defaultLanguage.title: Default language for new problems
cph.general.defaultLanguage.description: The default language for problems imported via Competitive Companion (None will give option to select language on importing problem every time)
cph.general.menuChoices.description: Space separated languages, in top to bottom order, shown in menu when a problem is imported via Competitive Companion. Example 'java python' would show java on top, followed by python.
cph.general.useShortCodeForcesName.descr: Use a short ID for problem file generated ( like 144C ) instead of the complete problem name for codeforces problems
cph.general.useShortLuoguName.descriptio: Use a short ID for problem file generated ( like P1145 / U123456 ) instead of the complete problem name for luogu problems
cph.general.useShortAtCoderName.descript: Use a short ID for problem file generated ( like abc123a ) instead of the complete problem name for atcoder problems
cph.general.retainWebviewContext.descrip: Keep the webview active even when it's hidden. May improve performance but may cause some rendering issues.
cph.general.defaultLanguageTemplateFileL: The path to the template file that will be used when creating a new file for the default language via Competitive Companion. For Java templates, use 'CLASS_NAME' as a placeholder for the class name like 'class CLASS_NAME{...}'
cph.general.autoShowJudge.description: Automatically show the judge view when opening a file that has a problem associated with it
cph.general.remoteServerAddress.descript: The address of the remote server to which the extension will send requests. (Currently used for live user count)
cph.general.showLiveUserCount.descriptio: Whether to display the live user count.
cph.companion.kattisError: Please ensure .kattisrc and submit.py are present in {0}
cph.companion.parseError: Error parsing problem from companion {0}. Raw problem: {1}
cph.companion.serverError: Are multiple VSCode windows open? CPH will work on the first opened window. CPH server encountered an error: {0}, companion may not work.
cph.compiler.launchError: Could not launch the compiler {0}. Is it installed?
cph.executor.launchError: Could not launch testcase process. Is '{0}' in your PATH?
cph.extension.statusBarTooltip: Competitive Programming Helper - Run all testcases or create if none exist.
cph.submit.notSupported: Active editor is not supported for submission
cph.utils.unsupported: Unsupported file extension. Only these types are valid: {0}
cph.preferences.invalidSaveLocation: Invalid save location, reverting to default. path not exists: {0}
